title: haplophyllum fruticulosum
intro: Haplophyllum fruticulosum, also known as the spiny broom or broom-like haplophyllum, is a species of plant in the Rutaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Haplophyllum fruticulosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
